_comment: Built-in MCP servers for Max. Servers listed here are loaded server-side on every chat request and their tools are merged into the LLM's tool list. They are NEVER exposed via /user/mcp-servers and therefore do NOT appear in the connectors UI. Use this file for org-wide integrations the operator wants always-on. Header/URL values may reference environment variables with ${VAR_NAME}; missing variables fall back to an empty string and a warning is logged. Each key under mcpServers becomes the slug used in tool routing (prefixed automatically with `sys-` to avoid clashing with user-defined connectors).
